info.name: Snowflake Database Role API
info.description:
The Snowflake Database Role API is a REST API that you can use to access, update, and perform certain actions on Database Role resource in a Snowflake database.

Contact Support:
 Name: Snowflake, Inc.
 Email: support@snowflake.com

item.name: List All Grants to the Role

request.description: List all grants to the role

item.name: List All Future Grants to the Role

request.description: List all future grants to the role

item.name: Grant Future Privileges to the Role

request.description: Grant future privileges to the role

item.name: Revoke Future Grants From the Role

request.description: Revoke future grants from the role

item.name: Create a New Database Role by Cloning From the Specified Resource

query.description: Database of the target resource. Defaults to the source's database

request.description: Create a new database role by cloning from the specified resource
